name: Phi-4-reasoning (14B)
note: 14B reasoning specialist SFT-tuned on 1.4M STEM prompts with o3-mini-distilled chain-of-thought; beats DeepSeek-R1-Distill-70B on AIME despite far fewer params; shipped alongside Phi-4-reasoning-plus.
tpsNote: No independently verified RTX 4090 llama.cpp benchmark found; third-party estimates cluster around 70-90 tok/s at Q4/Q5 for this 14B dense model.

results.notes: IFEval Strict, avg pass@1 over 5 generations (Eureka ML Insights harness). Confirmed on HF model card and in Table 2 of the arXiv technical report (2504.21318).
ArenaHard, avg pass@1. Confirmed on HF model card and Table 2 of the technical report.
MMLU-Pro; already present in the sibling corpus record 'Phi-4-reasoning' but missing from this one, though both cite the same HF model card.

Codeforces Elo rating (Table 1 of the Phi-4-reasoning Technical Report), computed over 143 problems from contest IDs 1505-1536 with 10 submission attempts per problem, averaged over runs. Not present on the HF model card, only in the arXiv paper.

verificationNotes: Re-fetched HF model card: 14B params, MIT license, 32K context, release date April 30, 2025 all confirmed exact. All 5 benchmark rows (AIME 75.3, GPQA-Diamond 65.8, HumanEvalPlus 92.9, LiveCodeBench 53.8, OmniMath 76.6) confirmed literally on the card. No changes made.
